column5: I need to cancel my reservation for the April 8 showing as it got cancelled.
Thank you for contacting us. I've reviewed your booking. The refund has been processed.
Great! How long will it take to appear in my account?
It typically takes 3-5 business days for refunds to appear. Check with your bank if delayed.
I was charged twice for the same ticket. This is the second time this happened!
We sincerely apologize. I can see the duplicate charge. Refunding the extra amount immediately.
Thank you for the quick response. Please make sure this doesn't happen again.
I keep getting an error message when trying to login. Password reset didn't help.
Can you please clear your browser cache and try again? Also try a different browser if possible.
Still not working. I've tried Chrome and Firefox.
I've reset your account credentials from our end. Try logging in with temporary password sent to your email.
The payment page won't load when I try to complete my purchase. Happens on mobile only.
There's a known issue on Android devices. We're working on a fix. Try mobile web browser instead of app.
Just experienced a complete crash when clicking checkout. Very frustrating!
We're investigating this issue urgently. Multiple users have reported it. ETA for fix is 2 hours.
Is this fixed yet? I want to complete my booking.
Fixed as of 15:00. Our apologies. Your previous items are still in cart ready to checkout.
I booked two tickets but they're not showing in my account. Already waited 30 minutes.
I can see your booking in our system. Refresh your app and log out then back in. Should appear.
I see
Test comment for verification
test
test
I purchased tickets for the April 8 showing but the event was cancelled.
I apologize for the inconvenience. Let me look into this for you.
Thank you for helping. I'd like a full refund please.
Your refund has been approved and processed to your original payment method.
Refund case RF001 processed successfully. Good customer service noted.
I was incorrectly charged twice for the same order!
This should not have happened. I sincerely apologize for the error.
When will I receive the refund for the duplicate charge?
The refund has already been initiated. You should see it within 3-5 business days.
Reviewed case RF002. Duplicate charge issue needs to be escalated to IT.
I'm having trouble logging into my account.
Let me help you troubleshoot. Have you tried resetting your password?
Yes, I reset it twice but still getting the same error message.
I've manually reset your account from our system. A new temporary password has been sent to your email.
Great! I'm in now. Thank you for the quick support.
Mobile payment page is crashing on my Android phone.
We've identified an issue with Android compatibility. Our dev team is working on it.
Is there a workaround I can use in the meantime?
Yes, try using our mobile web version through your browser as a temporary workaround.
The workaround worked! Please fix the app soon.
I need to change my seat reservation for the concert on April 25.
I can help you change your seat. Which section would you prefer?
I'd like to move from C12 to Orchestra seating if available.
Great! I've moved you from C12 to A5 in the Orchestra section. Confirmation sent to your email.
The entire booking system crashed when I clicked checkout!
We're aware of this critical issue. Our engineers are working on it right now.
Is it fixed yet? I need to complete my purchase today.
Yes, it's fixed! Your items are still in your cart. Please try again.
Excellent! Purchase completed successfully. Thank you!
I booked tickets but they're not appearing in my account.
Let me check on that. Can you provide your order number?
Found the issue. Reloading your account should display them now. Try logging out and back in.
Perfect! They're showing now. Much appreciated!
I want a refund. The movie was really disappointing.
We're sorry to hear that. Let me process a refund for you.
How long does refund processing take?
Standard processing is 3-5 business days. You'll receive an email confirmation.
Customer satisfaction note: RF003 handled well by SS003. Review product feedback.
App keeps crashing on my iPad when loading the cinema menu.
Sorry to hear that. What version of iOS are you running?
iOS 17.4 on iPad Air. Latest version.
There's a known issue with iOS 17.4. We've pushed a fix to the app store. Please update.
Need to reschedule my movie tickets to a different time slot.
Let me help you find an available time slot.
What about the evening show at 7 PM instead of 2 PM?
Perfect! I've updated your reservation to the 7 PM showing. New ticket emailed to you.
General inquiry: Do you offer group discounts?
Yes! We offer discounts for groups of 10 or more. Contact our group sales team.
Great! I'll reach out to them. Thanks for the information.
Unable to update my profile information. Getting an error.
Let me check what error you're receiving. Can you duplicate the steps?
Yes, whenever I try to save phone number changes, it says 'Invalid format'.
Found the bug! Our validation was too strict. It's fixed now. Please try again.
Works perfectly now! Thank you for the quick fix.
